name: Curried Turkey on Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the margarine in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped apple and onion to the skillet.
3. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the onions are tender.
4. Stir in the flour, salt, and curry powder.
5. Gradually whisk in the lowfat milk.
6. Bring the mixture to a simmer, stirring constantly.
7. Add the diced cooked turkey and continue cooking until hot and bubbly.
8. Serve the turkey and sauce over brown rice.
(No specific quantity of rice is provided in the original recipe.)
